site.name: Perfecting The Saints
site.tagline: Faith and Charity in the name of Jesus

hero.eyebrow: Faith and Charity in the name of Jesus
hero.title: Awakening faith. Serving people. Carrying hope.
hero.text: A modern ministry home for Perfecting The Saints, created to reflect holiness, the Holy Spirit, community care, prayer, outreach, and the light of Christ.

about.title: A ministry shaped by holiness, compassion, and the Spirit of God.
about.text: Perfecting The Saints exists to serve people spirit, soul, and body through prayer, teaching, outreach, feeding, medical care, and practical love.
about.scripture: Whatever you do in words or deeds, do all in the name of Jesus.

leaders.name: Sylvia
leaders.bio:
Whatever you do in words or deeds, do all in the name of Jesus. Colossians 3:17
God loves people
Ministry is all about people: their well-being, spirit, soul, and body

leaders.name: George
leaders.bio:
We walk by faith and not by sight. 2 Corinthians 5:7
Things are not always how they seem to appear, but faith makes everything clear.

ministries.title: Feeding Outreach
ministries.text: Practical love for families and communities through food support and compassionate care.

ministries.title: Medical Support
ministries.text: Health-focused outreach that meets people with dignity, prayer, and practical help.

ministries.title: Prayer and Teaching
ministries.text: Gatherings centered on Scripture, encouragement, holiness, and the presence of God.

ministries.title: Community Care
ministries.text: Serving spirit, soul, and body with consistent kindness and follow-up support.

outreach.title: Bring your photos and videos here.
outreach.text: This area is ready for ministry photos, outreach footage, testimonies, feeding events, medical drives, and community service moments

announcements.title: Community Outreach
announcements.text: Use the admin page to announce the next outreach date, location, and instructions.

announcements.title: Perfecting The Saints
announcements.text: Online connection for prayer and teaching. Join us live on Youtube and Facebook

announcements.title: Ministry Gathering
announcements.text: Post upcoming worship, outreach, teaching, or community care updates here.

donation.note: Your giving supports feeding outreaches, medical support, prayer ministry, and compassionate care.
donation.instructions: Click Continue to Giving to view the account details for your donation.
